title: Palm Tyre - last years’ winner: nominated for Best of George yet again!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Winning Best Tyre Fitment...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Winning Best Tyre Fitment Centre for 2023 and 2024 was the biggest honour for us and we were truly humbled by that great achievement.


> Being nominated for the Best of George award for the third year gives us a feeling of great elation and we feel truly blessed to be in this position once again.


The backing from our community means the world to us and is what keeps us wanting to be better.

Our commitmentSince our doors opened in 1978, Palm Tyre has aimed to ensure you reach your destination safely. Our team is a passionate group of people who are experts in their field and always willing to help.

With a combined service of over 80 years, we provide the product and services you need to keep your car on the road and dependable. We are your natural choice for all makes and sizes of tyres, ranging from small passenger to extra-large commercial tyres.

We offer the best quality tyres, with exceptional service, at insanely good prices. In addition, we are a Dunlop zone, making us the leaders of the pack.

Our prices are the cheapest in the Garden Route, and being able to beat any quote gives us the standout quality that is synonymous with the name "Palm Tyre". Bringing your vehicle to us ensures that you will have the best experience in town.


> PHOTO GALLERY - Palm Tyre - last years’ winner: nominated for Best of George yet again!


Our services Our services include wheel balancing and alignment, tyre rotation, puncture repair, free vehicle safety check and tyre insurance, as well as a pick-up and drop-off service.

Our team consists of PJ Botha, Paul Rudolph, Mark Wierzba and Enrico Jonck. We have a staff compliment of nearly 40 workers, all experts in their field, giving you, our customer, the best service possible.

We pride ourselves on being involved with the community in various ways through sponsorships, donations and outreaches. We currently host two athletic races annually that attract people from all over the Western Cape. Both races have a history of over 20 years and are always huge successes, enjoyed by many.

Thank youWe thank each and every person who has contributed to the success of Palm Tyre. Without every customer, supporter, friend and family member, we would not be in the position we are today. We are truly grateful for all the love and support we receive on a daily basis. Remember, every day is a sale day at Palm Tyre!

Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

THE BEST PRICES! THE BEST SERVICE! GUARANTEED!

https://palmtyre.co.za/

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
